scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build:dev: cd artifacts/bharatscan && PORT=${PORT:-8080} BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/} node_modules/.bin/vite build --config vite.config.ts --mode development
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "vite,electron" -c "cyan,magenta" "pnpm --filter @workspace/bharatscan run dev" "pnpm --dir electron run dev"
scripts.electron:build: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:server && pnpm --dir electron run build
